# MDE v1.3.19

## Features

- Added an editor line-spacing control beside the history and view controls, with Compact, Standard, and Relaxed modes that persist across app restarts.
- Improved Markdown document rendering with more readable body spacing, no heading underline, and syntax-highlighted code blocks.
- Moved Mermaid flowchart previews below the document source area and added a read-only zoomable preview dialog.
- Scoped Select All inside the editor so Cmd+A/Ctrl+A selects the current document content instead of the whole app shell.
- Kept the editor slash command label for links as `Link` in Chinese and English UI.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed the link picker so Escape closes it even after focus leaves the link input.
- Kept the compact editor action bar within its intended width after adding the line-spacing button.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added Shiki as the renderer syntax-highlighting dependency using the JavaScript regex engine for Electron CSP compatibility.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for editor line-spacing preferences, Mermaid preview placement and zoom, editor Select All scoping, code-block highlighting, link slash command naming, and link picker Escape handling.
- Refreshed zh-CN user manual screenshots for the updated editor toolbar, rendering, Mermaid, link, AI, search, and settings views.

## Documentation and User Manual

- Updated generated user manual screenshots under `user-manual/public/screenshots/zh-CN/`.
- Verified the user manual build for the refreshed screenshot set.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:screenshots`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions should publish the macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.3.19`.
- Repository signing/notarization secrets could not be inspected locally because the current GitHub token does not have Actions secrets read permission; release signing behavior will follow the repository's configured secrets.
